COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Atty. Sam Ware appearing for the Plaintiff Sonny Chong.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sonny Chong, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: MORRIE FRIEDMAN, SALLY KLEIN, AUTOMOBILE BUSINESS SOLUTIONS AND OLD INC;
The following exhibits were presented:
Exhibit 1- CHECKS GIVEN TO MR. FIEDMAN--------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- CASHED CHECKS FROM BANK OF SONNY CHONG ---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Sonny Chong and against the Defendants MORRIE FRIEDMAN AND SALLY KLEIN as follows:
Principal $ 100,000 ; Punitive damages (to be determined);
Interest $ 38,500
Cost -(upon filing of memorandum of cost)
Plaintiff to recover from defendant Automobile Business Solutions, the Principal amount of $25,000 and cost. And the Plaintiff also to recover from the defendant Old Inc.the amount of $75,000 and cost.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court, and to prepare Judgment for signature.
